view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for an itinerary builder with time estimates is satisfied based on the provided evidence.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for an itinerary builder with time estimates is satisfied based on the provided evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for an itinerary builder with time estimates as detailed in the linked use case. The itinerary for the food tour of Little Italy includes specific time allocations for each stop, demonstrating that the system coordinates timing between venues effectively. This is evidenced by the detailed itinerary provided in the linked use case, which outlines the timing for each stop and adjustments made due to delays, confirming that the requirement is met.
